title: Game Objectives
earnPoints: 💕 Earn the most points before the deadline.
topPlayer: 🏆 The Daily Top Player becomes her boyfriend for the following day!
topPlayerNote: ※ Earns 70% of that day's creator fees for the following day.
marriagePrize: 💍 The marriage partner is chosen only from past boyfriends.
marriagePrizeNote: ※ If she chooses you, you win 10% of all-time creator fees.
